memoryArtifacts.description:
NEHGS REGISTER 1932 p 408
The will of WILLIAM FISK of Laxfeld [Laxfield, co Suffolk] the Elder, dated 6 March 1462 [1462/3]. To be buried at Laxfeld church. To the high altar there, for tithes forgott …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Symon Fiske於大約1397年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉可費爾德時，他的父親Hugh Fiske28歲，母親Katherine Burgess20歲。他於1424年與Susanna Smyth在英國素福爾可拉可費爾德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1463年在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉可費爾德被列為a wheelwright。他去世於1464年2月26日在他的家鄉享年68歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可拉可費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Symon Fiske于大约1397年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可拉可費爾德时，他的父亲Hugh Fiske28岁，母亲Katherine Burgess20岁。他于1424年与Susanna Smyth在英国素福爾可拉可費爾德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1463年在英国英格兰素福爾可拉可費爾德被列为a wheelwright。他去世于1464年2月26日在他的家乡享年68岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可拉可費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Fiske
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from a farm in western Norway, named from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ + -e from vin ‘meadow’.

variants.name: Fisk
meanings: English (East Anglia): metonymic occupational name for a fisherman or fish seller, or a nickname for someone supposedly resembling a fish in some way, from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ (cognate with Old English fisc). See Fish 1.

nameMeanings.name: Symon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Symon Fiske was born about 1397, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hugh Fiske, was 28 and his mother, Katherine Burgess, was 20. He married Susanna Smyth in 1424, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. In 1463, his occupation is listed as a wheelwright in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. He died on 26 February 1464, in his hometown, at the age of 68, and was buried in Laxfield, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Symon Fiske est né environ 1397, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh Fiske, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Katherine Burgess, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Susanna Smyth en 1424, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. En 1463, sa profession de son indiquée est a wheelwright à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 26 février 1464, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Symon Fiske um 1397 in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Fiske 28 und seine Mutter Katherine Burgess 20. Er hat 1424 in Laxfield, Suffolk, England Susanna Smyth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1463 ist sein Beruf als a wheelwright in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 26. Februar 1464 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Laxfield, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Symon Fiske è nato il circa 1397 nel Laxfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Hugh Fiske, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Burgess, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Susanna Smyth nel 1424, nel Laxfield, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1463, la sua occupazione è indicata come a wheelwright nel Laxfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 26 febbraio 1464, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Laxfield, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Symon Fiskeが約1397年にイギリスイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドで生まれた時，父Hugh Fiskeは28歳，母Katherine Burgessは20歳であった。1424年にイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドでSusanna Smythと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1463年，イギリスイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドでの職業はa wheelwrightと記録されている。彼は1464年2月26日に故郷で68歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクラクスフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Symon Fiske(이)가 대략 1397년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 라스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Fiske(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Burgess(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1424년 영국 수폴크 라스필드에서 Susanna Smyth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1463년, 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 라스필드에서 a wheelwright이었다. 그는 1464년 2월 26일 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 라스필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Symon Fiske nasceu aproximadamente 1397, em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh Fiske, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Burgess, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Susanna Smyth em 1424, em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1463, sua profissão aparece como a wheelwright em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 26 de fevereiro de 1464, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Symon Fiske родился около 1397 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hugh Fiske было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Burgess, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Susanna Smyth в 1424 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. В 1463 году он работал по профессии a wheelwright в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 26 февраля 1464 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Symon Fiske nació aproximadamente 1397, en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh Fiske, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Katherine Burgess, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Susanna Smyth en 1424, en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. En 1463, su ocupación registrada era a wheelwright en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 26 de febrero de 1464, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
